_comment: High-confidence sender -> AREA mapping for auto-filing. First matching rule wins. Google is matched by exact sender (one domain spans four areas); everything else by domain SUFFIX so sub-domains (updates.zernio.com, comms.assemblyai.com) still match. Area labels are the FILING layer and are orthogonal to Triage/* (the ACTION layer) — a message can carry both. Archiving is owned by triage, except an explicit --file bulk move.
_humanAreas: Clients/Normal, Clients/Urgent, Leads, and the action label 'Missed Response' are assigned by judgement (cron Claude turn or by hand), NOT by the high-confidence sender rules below.

rules._note: Automated system/app alerts (Vercel, hosting/DNS, AI tools, Zernio notifications). crisp.email is DELIBERATELY excluded — elean@/ana@zernio.on.crisp.email are real humans (partnership/podcast), routed to Clients/Leads by hand, never auto-filed.
